data.body:
AC2 landed and deployed. Merged to main as Gerrit change 861 (commit 820159375 'f600: autodeploy re-runs fetch-secrets before compose up'; rebar-ticket: f600 trailer; LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1; reachable from HEAD).

Code (infra/scripts/autodeploy.sh): added SECRETS_PATHS trigger (fetch-secrets.sh, ssm.tf); the review-bot redeploy block now fires on 'changed BOT_PATHS || changed SECRETS_PATHS'; fetch-secrets.sh re-runs right before 'docker compose up' (after rsync, TARGET copy); on SSM failure it aborts fail-safe (err marker + record_backoff_failure, .env intact, running bot untouched, no rollback). Tests: tests/scripts/test_autodeploy_fetch_secrets.py — (a) fetch-secrets runs before compose up on a secrets-only change; (b) failure aborts without building. make lint + typecheck + the tests green.

DEPLOYED to prod box i-00880b2c7f13527c5 (us-east-1) via SSM on 2026-07-21: /opt/rebar/infra/scripts/autodeploy.sh now has SECRETS_PATHS (owner 502:502, mode 755 preserved, bash -n clean, prior version backed up to .bak-f600). Triggered rebar-autodeploy.service: Result=success, ExecMainStatus=0, 'up to date; no-op', no AUTODEPLOY_ERROR, /health 200. The new fetch-secrets-before-compose-up path will fire on the next bot/secrets change.

AC1 was already DONE in prod (change 492 / artifact 8e68). Out-of-scope follow-ups remain separately tracked: least-privilege PAT swap (human-only) and bug d220 (fresh-volume entrypoint write-dead).
